info.name: Botchat SaaS API v1
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for Botchat SaaS.

**Central API** → Use CENTRAL_URL environment
**Tenant API** → Use TENANT_URL environment

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection + the Environment file
2. Login via 🔐 Auth > Login
3. Copy token to SUPERADMIN_TOKEN or TENANT_TOKEN
4. All authenticated requests will use the token automatically

request.description: Returns Bearer token. Copy to SUPERADMIN_TOKEN env variable.

item.name: 🏠 TENANT — Admin & Staff API
item.description: All Tenant Admin/Staff endpoints. Base URL: {{TENANT_URL}}/api/v1

body.raw:
{
    "question": "What is your email?",
    "input_type": "email",
    "save_to": "email",
    "validation": "email",
    "retry_message": "Invalid email, please try again",
    "next_step_id": "{{NEXT_STEP_ID}}"
}
